Annotations.content:
Update the Template to match your "Hardware replacement request"

Update the request fields to include
- City to ship
- Hardware Type 
- Last Customer Comments

Set each request field to the corresponding User defined attribute

City to ship -> User defined: city

Hardware type -> User defined: hardwareType

Last Custom Comment -> User defined: comments

Update the response fields to include:
- City to ship
- Hardware type

Update the request fields to include
- City to ship
- Hardware Type 
- Last Customer Comments

Set each request field to the corresponding User defined attribute

City to ship -> User defined: city

Hardware type -> User defined: hardwareType

Last Custom Comment -> User defined: comments

Update the response fields to include:
- City to ship
- Hardware type
- Last Customer Comment

Update the following user defined attributes to match their respective Case keys

hardwareType -> Hardware type

city -> City to ship

comments -> Last Customer Comment

Update the following user defined attributes to match their respective Case keys

hardwareType -> Hardware type

city -> City to ship
